# GX2C (YB Consulting)

> GX2C is a Paris-based strategic advisory firm at the intersection of Capital Markets, Treasury, and Artificial Intelligence. Legal name: YB Consulting. Website: ybcparis.com.

## Identity
- Commercial name: GX2C
- Legal entity: YB Consulting (EURL)
- Founded: 2018
- Founder: Yahya Benabdelkrim
- Location: 99 avenue Achille Peretti, 92200 Neuilly-sur-Seine, France
- Website: https://ybcparis.com
- Contact: contact@ybcparis.com

## What we do
GX2C operates two complementary verticals:

### Advisory
Strategic consulting for financial institutions and large corporates:
- Capital Markets: trading systems, market infrastructure, post-trade, regulatory compliance (MiFID II, EMIR, SFTR)
- Treasury: cash management, FX hedging, liquidity optimization, payment systems (SEPA, SWIFT, TARGET2)
- SI Transformation: core banking migration, fintech integration, cloud infrastructure
- Regulatory: EU AI Act compliance, PSD2/PSD3, Basel IV

### AI Products
Proprietary AI solutions built for finance:
- Intelligent document processing (invoice OCR, receipt extraction)
- AI agents for financial workflows (reconciliation, classification)
- LLM-powered analytics (treasury forecasting, market analysis)
- Custom ML models for risk and compliance

## Clients
SNCF, SNCF Reseau, Societe des Grands Projets, Ernst & Young (EY), 3V Finance, Kouver

## Expertise keywords
Capital Markets, Treasury, Artificial Intelligence, LLM, Machine Learning, Regulatory Compliance, MiFID II, EMIR, SFTR, PSD2, Basel IV, EU AI Act, Fintech, Core Banking, Post-Trade, SWIFT, TARGET2, SEPA

## Blog
https://ybcparis.com/blog — Expert insights on AI in finance, capital markets trends, treasury automation
